mapper.sql: number_id, topic_id, topic_name, species_id, species_name, file_name, del_flag, organization_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select fwbn.number_id,tt.topic_name,fwbn.species_name,fwbn.file_name,so.organization_name,fwbn.organization_id,fwbn.create_time from fr_wax_block_number fwbn left join sys_organization so on fwbn.organization_id = so.organization_id left join tb_topic tt on fwbn.topic_id=tt.topic_id where fwbn.del_flag='0'
and fwbn.species_id = #{speciesId}
and tt.topic_name like concat('%',#{topicName},'%')
and fwbn.organization_id = #{organizationId}
AND date_format(fwbn.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{createTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fwbn.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{createTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fwbn.create_time desc
